info.title: LifeLink API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the LifeLink donation platform API. All routes are mounted at root paths. For realistic data and examples, run `npm run seed-demo` and use the seeded demo credentials, QR tokens, and printed IDs.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, email verification, password reset, 2FA, and token management for all roles

tags.name: Donor
tags.description: All donor-facing endpoints: profile, dashboard, urgent requests, appointments, donation history, rewards, badges, activity, settings, notifications, hospitals, analytics, campaigns

tags.name: Hospital
tags.description: Hospital self-management: profile, blood bank, capacity, QR verification, request management

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin operations: user management, analytics, rewards, campaigns, system maintenance, metrics, and audit logs

locationRequired.description: true when registration completed without GPS coordinates

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's activity timeline
get.description:
Returns a paginated, timestamped history of all user actions (donations, rewards, urgent responses, profile updates).
Supports optional filtering by activity type.
Results are sorted newest-first.


Demo seed available via `npm run seed-demo`. Base URL example: https://graduation-project-cy61.onrender.com Parameter examples are aligned with the seeded demo dataset where possible.

post.summary: Verify donor QR code at hospital check-in
post.description:
Hospital staff scans the donor's QR code to confirm the donation.
- Validates the QR token, checks expiry and one-time usage
- Marks the appointment as completed
- Creates a Donation record
- Updates donor statistics and triggers reward/badge flow

**Role required:** hospital | admin | superadmin

qrToken.description: The secure QR token scanned from the donor's device

400.description:
One of:
- qrToken is required
- QR code expired
- Appointment is cancelled
- Appointment is not active

403.description: Donor is not eligible to donate

post.description:

get.summary: Get supported donation types with details
get.description:
Returns all supported donation types including medical hold periods and point values.
- Blood: 56-day cooldown, 200 points
- Plasma: 14-day cooldown, 150 points
- Platelets: 7-day cooldown, 175 points
- Organ: 365-day cooldown, 500 points


Demo seed available via `npm run seed-demo`. Base URL example: https://graduation-project-cy61.onrender.com Parameter examples are aligned with the seeded demo dataset where possible.

types.name: Whole Blood
types.description: Standard blood donation - most common type

types.name: Plasma
types.description: Plasma donation - more frequent possible donations

post.summary: Validate if a donor can donate for a given hospital and date
post.description:
Checks donation eligibility based on:
- Type-specific cooldown period (blood: 56d, plasma: 14d, platelets: 7d, organ: 365d)
- Minimum age (17 years old)
- Hemoglobin level (minimum 12.5 g/dL)
- Travel deferrals
- Temporary medical deferrals


Demo seed available via `npm run seed-demo`. Base URL example: https://graduation-project-cy61.onrender.com This operation includes a seeded demo request example.

Demo seed available via `npm run seed-demo`. Base URL example: https://graduation-project-cy61.onrender.com This operation includes a seeded demo request example.

donationType.description: Type of donation - affects cooldown period

data.reason: Donor is eligible for blood donation
Blood donation cooldown: must wait 45 more days
Donor must be at least 17 years old to donate

post.summary: Mark a donation as completed and award points
post.description:
Completes a donation and triggers point award based on donation type:
- Blood: 200 points (+ campaign multiplier if active)
- Plasma: 150 points (+ campaign multiplier if active)
- Platelets: 175 points (+ campaign multiplier if active)
- Organ: 500 points (+ campaign multiplier if active)

Also triggers first-donation bonus if applicable.

Returns the hospital's current appointment slot configuration: how many donors can book per hour (slotsPerHour) and the working hours window (workingHoursStart / workingHoursEnd). These values drive the available-slots calculation seen by donors.

Demo seed available via `npm run seed-demo`. Base URL example: https://graduation-project-cy61.onrender.com Parameter examples are aligned with the seeded demo dataset where possible.

put.description:
Set how many donors can book per hour and adjust the hospital's working hours window. All fields are optional — send only what you want to change.
**Constraints** - `slotsPerHour`: integer 1–100 - `workingHoursStart`: integer 0–23 (hour in 24h format) - `workingHoursEnd`: integer 1–24, must be greater than workingHoursStart
